question: Design a 2-minute pitch outline and provide investor-perspective critique for LearnHub (45K registered, 800 WAU AI peer learning platform) — fictional example

rubrics.point: Generated a structured pitch outline following a recognized framework (Vertebrae, Problem-Solution-Traction, or similar)
The pitch outline fits within a 2-minute time constraint (concise, not overloaded)
Addressed the 'manual community management to AI scalability' transition with specific logic
Discussed the registration-vs-retention gap (45K registered vs 800 WAU) and its investor perception risk
Provided actionable, specific critique (not generic advice that could apply to any startup)
Referenced specific data points from the project context (user numbers, engagement metrics, etc.)
